subcodes.first_line: O ye who are enraptured by the heart-captivating countenance of that peerless Beloved, Center of beauty and grace, as He gleameth in the mirror of glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجذوبان روی دلجوی آن دلبر بیهمتا مرکز حسن و جمال چون در آاینه جلال جلوه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @being a source of light; guidance
